chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 150 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.602/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.603/2024 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 02.02.2024 Mr. Muhammad Sharif Buriro, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Assistant Director (Law) of Election Commission of Pakistan and Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh, present in Court in other matters, waive notice of this petition. With consent of all present, this petition is allowed in the terms whereby Polling Station GPS Khanan Buriro, which was the polling station in General Elections of 2018, is restored instead of Community Hall Nek Muhammad Buriro (Combined)-I, which was changed by District Returning Officer purportedly on the report of Returning Officer. The petition is disposed of in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
